data.content: Rejected in implementation_review. Findings: (1) src/app/beats/page.tsx:46-65 removes the agent-name prefix stripping logic, so Claude rows regress from model='Opus' to model='Claude Opus', which is unrelated to the history.png screenshot beat and appears to undo the prior label fix. (2) src/app/beats/__tests__/page-active-agent-info.test.ts was deleted entirely; that file was the direct regression coverage for the formatter behavior changed in the same commit, leaving no src/app/beats unit tests. Validation: docs/screenshots/history.png itself does satisfy the beat by showing a selected beat and visible conversation log. Targeted test check: 'bun run test -- src/app/beats' now reports no test files found.
